text: Author: jkois Date: Wed Apr 24 17:09:32 2013 New Revision: 41489 URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/41489 Log: PR: www/175716 Add ServerManagementPlus from India to list of consultants with FreeBSD support. Requested by: Sreejit Modified: head/share/xml/commercial.consult.xml Modified: head/share/xml/commercial.consult.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/xml/commercial.consult.xml Wed Apr 24 16:53:10 2013 (r41488) +++ head/share/xml/commercial.consult.xml Wed Apr 24 17:09:32 2013 (r41489) @@ -1131,6 +1131,19 @@ + + ServerManagementPlus + http://www.secnetix.de/ + + ServerManagementPlus is a outsourced server management and + administration company, based in Maharashtra, India. We offer + configuration, optimization and tuning services for FreeBSD + servers. Please visit our web site for more + information. + + + Southern Gazer http://www.southerngazer.com _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
